messaging.title: Communication Role Management

messaging.npcPersonalityHelper: Controls the default communication posture for this unit.

welcome.title: Welcome Stakeholder
welcome.description: Inventorium is your enterprise-grade AI-powered task optimization and strategic project visualization platform.
welcome.subtitle: Let's streamline your onboarding process to maximize your time-to-value.

projects-overview.title: Strategic Initiatives
projects-overview.description: Organize your work items into strategic initiatives for enhanced visibility and optimized resource allocation.
projects-overview.hint: 💡 Best Practice: Align all work items to strategic initiatives

create-project.title: Initialize Your First Strategic Initiative
create-project.description: Let's configure a strategic initiative to optimize your workflow management. Initiatives provide the organizational framework for consolidating related deliverables.
create-project.step1: Access the Resource Allocation Interface (+) located in the action zone
create-project.step2: Navigate to the 'Project' configuration module within the deployment dialog
create-project.step3: Input a unique initiative identifier (kebab-case convention, e.g., 'my-first-initiative')
create-project.step4: Input display name and initiative charter documentation
create-project.hint: Best Practice: Initiative identifiers must be unique and follow kebab-case naming conventions

add-todo.title: Deploy Work Item to Your Initiative
add-todo.description: Now let's deploy a work item to your strategic initiative. Work items are the actionable deliverables and tasks required for operational success.
add-todo.step1: Access the Resource Allocation Interface (+) again
add-todo.step2: Navigate to the 'Todo' deployment module within the creation dialog
add-todo.step3: Input your work item deliverable description
add-todo.step4: Select your strategic initiative from the organizational dropdown
add-todo.hint: Best Practice: Work items can be deployed from any interface location using the (+) allocation tool

configure-ai.title: Deploy AI Productivity Assistant
configure-ai.description: Maximize operational efficiency by integrating an AI provider such as Google Gemini or OpenAI into your workflow management system.

benefits.suggestions: Auto-generate strategic action items and deliverables
benefits.enhance: Optimize work item descriptions with intelligent insights
benefits.analyze: Perform advanced analytics on initiative dependencies
benefits.insights: Generate actionable productivity metrics and KPI recommendations

configure-ai.statusConfigured: Status: ✅ AI assistant deployed and operational!

configure-ai.helpText: AI assistant can be configured at any time via Settings → AI Configuration

ai-assistant.title: AI Productivity Assistant
ai-assistant.description: Leverage your AI productivity assistant to optimize task management, analyze workflows, and maximize operational efficiency.
ai-assistant.hint: 💡 Best Practice: Access the messaging interface to engage assistant

swarmdesk.tabTip: After suite deployment completes, leverage the TAB key to seamlessly transition between dashboard and 3D workspace interfaces
